channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Australia's Political Fracture Driven by Climate and Immigration Tensions
item.description: Political columnist Mark Kenny warns of a potential serious fracture in Australia's political landscape, questioning the stability of the traditional two-party system. He argues that familiar concepts...

item.title: US-Iran peace talks cancelled after planned meeting in Pakistan is called off
item.description: Peace talks between the United States and Iran have been cancelled, with a scheduled meeting in Pakistan not going ahead as planned. The decision comes amid ongoing tensions between the two nations, w...

item.title: Maithreyi Karnoor's 'Gooday Nagar' Explores Life, Love, and a Surreal Future
item.description: Maithreyi Karnoor's short story collection, 'Gooday Nagar,' offers a unique blend of slice-of-life narratives and speculative fiction, all set within the fictional town of Gooday Nagar. The collection...

item.title: Police identify victim in Hamilton mall shooting as search continues for two suspects
item.description: Police in Hamilton have identified the victim of a fatal shooting at a local shopping mall, as investigators continue their search for two suspects believed to be involved in the incident. One of the ...

item.title: Highway 16 Closed Due to Rock Slide in Rocky Mountains Between Jasper, Alta., and B.C.
item.description: Early on Saturday morning, a significant rock slide occurred in the Rocky Mountains, causing the closure of Highway 16 to all traffic from approximately 12 kilometres west of Jasper, Alberta, stretchi...

item.title: Malema sentencing highlights tensions between political loyalty and the rule of law in South Africa
item.description: This opinion piece argues that the sentencing of Julius Malema is less about one individual and more about South Africa’s broader commitment to constitutionalism and the rule of law. The case has unfo...

item.title: Trump Accused of Secretly Awarding No-Bid Contract to Preferred Firm at Inflated Price
item.description: A recent report claims that the Trump administration secretly awarded a no-bid contract to Clark Construction, a Maryland-based company known for its ties to the former president. The contract, initia...

item.title: Barcelona secure 2-0 win over Getafe to strengthen LaLiga lead
item.description: On Saturday, Barcelona take another step closer to the LaLiga title as dem beat Getafe 2-0 away from home. With this win, Barcelona don gather 85 points, putting dem 11 points ahead of second-placed R...

item.title: Palermo reacts to speculation over Dua Lipa and Callum Turner’s possible summer wedding
item.description: Palermo is reportedly abuzz with excitement following rumours that singer Dua Lipa and British actor Callum Turner could marry in the Sicilian capital in June. The speculation stems from Italian media...

item.title: Guide to Selecting Reliable Gift Card Trading Apps in Nigeria
item.description: Many Nigerians dey turn unused gift cards like Apple, Steam or Amazon into real cash instead of making dem waste. While social media like WhatsApp, Facebook or Telegram groups dey popular for beginner...

item.title: Zimbabwe’s CA3 Constitutional Amendments Do Not Require a Referendum, Legal Analysis Shows
item.description: Zimbabwe is currently engaged in a heated discussion about the proposed Constitution of Zimbabwe Amendment (No 3) Bill, 2026 (CA3). Opposition parties are calling for a national referendum, while supp...

item.title: Old Fort, B.C., faces recurring landslides, residents discuss long-term safety and future
item.description: The small riverside community of Old Fort, B.C., has once again been cut off due to a slow-moving landslide, marking the third such event in less than ten years. Approximately 150 residents are affect...

item.title: Carolina Hurricanes sweep Ottawa Senators in first-round playoff series
item.description: The Ottawa Senators were eliminated from the 2026 Stanley Cup playoffs after being swept 4-0 by the Carolina Hurricanes. In the decisive game, Logan Stankoven scored the go-ahead goal in the third per...

item.title: Elon Musk faces OpenAI in legal dispute over AI direction and governance
item.description: Billionaire entrepreneur Elon Musk has reportedly entered a legal confrontation with OpenAI, marking a significant development in the ongoing tensions surrounding the future of artificial intelligence...

item.title: Governor Mbah Honors Jim Nwobodo with Vanguard Lifetime Achievement Award
item.description: Governor Peter Mbah of Enugu State recently attended the Vanguard Personality of the Year Award ceremony in Lagos, where he presented the prestigious Lifetime Achievement Award to Jim Nwobodo, a forme...

item.title: Master Hanz Cua's Feng Shui Forecast for April 26, 2026
item.description: Master Hanz Cua, a well-known Feng Shui expert in the Philippines, shares his predictions for April 26, 2026. According to his insights, the day may bring both challenges and opportunities, depending ...

item.title: IMF Allegedly Pressures Kenya: Gachagua Claims Removal of Ruto is Condition for Aid
item.description: Things are getting real interesting in Kenya! Deputy President Rigathi Gachagua has dropped a bombshell, claiming that the International Monetary Fund (IMF) privately told him that Kenya won't receive...

item.title: Strait of Hormuz tensions drive costs and accelerate global supply chain shifts
item.description: Rising tensions around the Strait of Hormuz, a critical global oil chokepoint handling about a fifth of the world’s supply, are sending ripple effects far beyond energy markets. As oil prices become m...

item.title: Fetterman Reaffirms Strong Support for Israel Despite Political Backlash
item.description: Sen. John Fetterman (D-Pa.) reiterated his strong support for Israel during a CNN interview, even as his stance appears to be costing him political support among Democratic voters. Speaking on “Smerco...

item.title: Teen motorcyclist killed in collision with car; two arrested
item.description: A teenage motorcyclist tragically lost their life following a collision with a car. Authorities have confirmed that two individuals have been arrested in connection with the incident. The collision oc...
